item.title: Iran live updates: 'We are just getting started,' Hegseth says
item.description: IDF airstrikes targeted "dozens" of sites connected to internal security forces.

item.title: WATCH: Firefighters rescue woman from sinking car
item.description: Body camera video captured the rescue of a 19-year-old trapped in her overturned vehicle after losing control of it on a winter road and crashing into...

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events

item.title: WATCH: Childhood photo meme trend sweeps the internet
item.description: Robin Roberts, George Stephanopoulos, Michael Strahan and others from the “GMA” team put their own spin on the nostalgic trend taking over social medi...

item.title: WATCH: NBA legend defies gravity, still slam dunks at 70
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to NBA legend Marques Johnson, who says this year may be his final birthday dunk.
